message:
chore(py): drop unused _NeighborhoodCacheLocal class (11 lines)

Never referenced anywhere in the codebase — leftover from a removed
caching layer. Full suite still 3877 passed / 1 xfailed / 84 skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-class _NeighborhoodCacheLocal(dict):
-    """Cache graph neighborhoods as concrete lists."""
-
-    def __init__(self, graph):
-        self.graph = graph
-
-    def __missing__(self, node):
-        neighbors = self[node] = list(self.graph[node])
-        return neighbors
-
-
 def _node_order_key_local(node):
     return (type(node).__module__, type(node).__qualname__, repr(node))
